zh.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustacia Fitzhugh於1250年出生在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，她的父親Ralf FitzHugh36歲，母親Joan Haye10歲。她於1262年之前與Nicholas de Cantelo在英國英格蘭越可爾英格曼東普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1310年5月28日享年60歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustacia Fitzhugh于1250年出生在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素时，她的父亲Ralf FitzHugh36岁，母亲Joan Haye10岁。她于1262年之前与Nicholas de Cantelo在英国英格兰越可爾英格曼東普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1310年5月28日享年60岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustacia Fitzhugh was born in 1250, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralf FitzHugh, was 36 and her mother, Joan Haye, was 10. She married Nicholas de Cantelo before 1262, in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 28 May 1310, at the age of 60, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustacia Fitzhugh est née en 1250, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralf FitzHugh, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Haye, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Cantelo avant 1262, à Ingmanthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1310, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustacia Fitzhugh 1250 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralf FitzHugh 36 und ihre Mutter Joan Haye 10. Sie hat vor 1262 in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas de Cantelo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1310 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustacia Fitzhugh è nata il nel 1250 nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, Ralf FitzHugh, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Joan Haye, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Cantelo prima del 1262, nel Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 maggio 1310, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムバーナルド カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Eustacia Fitzhughが1250年にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで生まれた時，父Ralf FitzHughは36歳，母Joan Hayeは10歳であった。1262年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアイングマンソルペでNicholas de Canteloと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1310年5月28日に60歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustacia Fitzhugh(이)가 1250년 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralf FitzHugh(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Haye(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1262년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 잉먼소에서 Nicholas de Cantelo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 5월 28일 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

mn.of Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England: Ingmanthorpe, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustacia Fitzhugh nasceu em 1250, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralf FitzHugh, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haye, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Cantelo antes 1262, em Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1310, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustacia Fitzhugh родилась в 1250 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralf FitzHugh было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Haye, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Cantelo перед 1262 г. в местности ингмантаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 28 мая 1310 г. в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustacia Fitzhugh nació en 1250, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralf FitzHugh, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Haye, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Cantelo antes de 1262, en Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1310, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
